info.title: LEON Spec Validator
info.description: Enterprise custom connector for LEON specification validation. Validates DOCX/PDF/TXT specification files against the Stellantis CTS template. fileContent is a STRING (JSON from Power Fx JSON(...,IncludeBinaryData) or plain base64) — NOT a File type. All endpoints are anonymous — no API key required.

post.summary: Upload and validate a specification file
post.description: Validates a .docx, .txt, or .pdf specification file against the CTS template. fileContent MUST be a STRING — bind it to =JSON(First(System.Activity.Attachments).Content, JSONFormat.IncludeBinaryData) which produces a JSON string like {"$content-type":"...","$content":"UEsDBBQ..."}. Bind fileName to =First(System.Activity.Attachments).Name. The backend parses the JSON string and decodes the base64 $content field. Do NOT bind a File/Blob/Record directly — that causes 'incorrect type: Record' errors.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON with fileName (string) and fileContent (string — JSON from Power Fx JSON(...,IncludeBinaryData) or plain base64). Bind fileContent to =JSON(First(System.Activity.Attachments).Content, JSONFormat.IncludeBinaryData) and fileName to =First(System.Activity.Attachments).Name.

400.description: Invalid file type or download failed

422.description: Missing fileUrl or could not extract text

post.summary: Validate a specification file from a URL
post.description: Downloads a specification file from a public URL and validates it against the CTS template. Only a URL string is needed — no file content. Use this when the user provides a SharePoint, OneDrive, or Blob Storage link as text (not a file attachment).

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object with fileUrl (public URL to the spec file).

400.description: Failed to download file from URL

post.description: Asks a natural-language question about uploaded specification documents. Returns an AI-generated answer synthesized from the spec files with source citations and confidence level.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object with the question string.

post.description: Validates a specification file that has already been uploaded. Provide the fileName returned by a previous upload call.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object with the fileName to validate.

post.summary: Analyze conformity matrix and generate Excel report
post.description: Uploads a conformity matrix spreadsheet (ODS or XLSX) from a URL, analyzes OK/NOK/NA items, and returns a color-coded Excel report. Uses fileUrl for file transfer.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object with fileUrl and fileName for the conformity matrix.

422.description: Missing file URL or file content

post.summary: Upload a file and get a public URL
post.description: Uploads a file to Azure Blob Storage and returns a public URL. The URL can then be used with the validate-url endpoint. Useful for the two-step upload-then-validate flow.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: JSON object with fileName and fileContent (base64-encoded file bytes).

fileUrl.description: Public URL to the specification file. In Copilot Studio, bind this to Topic.Var1.ContentUrl (StringDataType, no type mismatch). The Azure Function downloads the file server-side.

fileName.description: Optional file name. In Copilot Studio, bind this to Topic.Var1.Name. If omitted, extracted from the URL.
The name of the file including extension (e.g., 'ASU_Spec.docx'). Bind to =First(System.Activity.Attachments).Name

fileContent.description: MUST be a STRING. Bind to =JSON(First(System.Activity.Attachments).Content, JSONFormat.IncludeBinaryData). This produces a JSON string like {"$content-type":"...","$content":"UEsDBBQ..."}. The backend parses it and decodes the base64 $content. Do NOT bind a File/Blob/Record directly — type: string only.

question.description: A natural-language question about the specification files.

fileName.description: The name of the specification file to validate (must have been previously uploaded).

answer.description: Human-readable validation summary with verdict and score.

verdict.description: Validation verdict: GOOD, ACCEPTABLE_WITH_FIXES, NOT_RELIABLE, or NON_COMPLIANT.

validationReport.description: Full evidence-backed validation report object with findings, scores, and rules used.

documentUrl.description: Download URL for the unified validation document (DOCX).

documentAvailable.description: True if a validation document is available for download.

answer.description: The AI-generated answer synthesized from specification documents.

status.description: Status of the answer: answered, clarify, not_found, refusal, or partial.

confidence.description: Confidence level: HIGH, MEDIUM, LOW, or empty.

sources.description: Source documents and excerpts used to generate the answer.

downloadUrl.description: Download URL for the Excel report.

reportAvailable.description: True if an Excel report is available for download.

fileUrl.description: Public URL to the uploaded file in Azure Blob Storage.

fileSize.description: Size of the uploaded file in bytes.
